title: Civillis Minecolonies Compatibility
description: Adds compatibility between Civillis and Minecolonies.
body: Requires Civilis as a dependency. Addon for [Civilis](https://modrinth.com/mod/civillis) to add compatibility to Minecolonies. Buildings in colonies will now create Civilis' civilized areas, preventing mob spawns in a nearby radius without the use of torches, helping to create a safer area around colonies and a more peaceful experience without entirely disabling hostile mobs globally.   ## __**Adds support for the following mods:**__ * Minecolonies ## __**Other Addons**__ [Civilis Magic](https://modrinth.com/project/civilis-magic-compatibility) adds support for most magic mods. [Civilis Technology](https://modrinth.com/project/civilis-technology-compatibility) adds support for most tech mods. ## __**Mod Development**__ Civilis and Civilis Minecolonies are still in development. More mods will be supported in the future. Contributions are welcome via the mod's GitHub repository. Civilis Minecolonies is an addon made in collaboration with the original Civilis developer. [ReversTeam Discord Server](https://discord.com/invite/TJKZgr6UDg) [Civilis Discord Server](https://discord.gg/jzRcfjfK2w)   Feel free to be used in any modpack.
